evals.prompt: I'm building a Next.js app and want to integrate Exa search and Jina reader into my TypeScript code. Show me how to install the SDKs and write the basic integration code.
evals.expected_output: Should provide npm install commands (exa-js), TypeScript code for Exa client initialization and search, and fetch-based patterns for Jina reader API. Should use process.env for API keys.
